import { Component, Output } from '@angular/core'; import { Router } from '@angular/router'; @Component({ selector: 'app-sidebar', templateUrl: './sidebar.component.html', styleUrls: ['./sidebar.component.css'] }) export class SidebarComponent { @Output() newPostClicked = new EventEmitter(); constructor(private router: Router) {} logout() { this.router.navigate(['/']); } openNewPost() { // If there's a listener (home page), emit to it // Otherwise navigate to home if (this.newPostClicked.observers.length > 0) { this.newPostClicked.emit(); } else { this.router.navigate(['/home']); } } }
@
